---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement aligned with the lab scope
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What limitation are you trying to address?

## Proposed change

Describe the enhancement. Must remain within defensive lab scope:

- Simulated tools only
- No real shell or network execution from model output
- Security by design, deny by default

## Security impact

How does this affect the control plane, broker, policy, or audit trail?

## Tests

What tests would prove the behavior? Link to [docs/testing-strategy.md](../../docs/testing-strategy.md).

## Alternatives

Optional: other approaches considered.
